fit-model.description: Fit a model that does not currently fit in VRAM.
warnings: A recommendation is an estimate until hardware qualification returns PASS.

longer-context.description: Increase usable context on the same GPU.

more-users.description: Increase concurrent requests under the same VRAM limit.

shared-prompts.description: Reduce memory for workloads with repeated prefixes or system prompts.

explain.description: Explain ChromoFold concepts and evidence levels without making a performance claim.

evidence_boundary.estimate: Generated from machine and workload metadata; not a measured result.
evidence_boundary.measured: Produced by a benchmark on a named machine and configuration.
evidence_boundary.qualified: Accepted only after the RC1 hardware harness returns PASS for the exact artifact digest.
evidence_boundary.independent: Reproduced by a third party from downloadable evidence.
